## Checklist

- [ ] Public API changed? If yes, describe:
- [ ] Docs updated for user-facing changes?
- [ ] Examples updated or new example added?
- [ ] Tests added or updated?
- [ ] Ran `ruff check .` and `mypy src tests` (no new violations)
- [ ] Ran `pytest -m "not external_data"` (all pass)
